title: LightMaker
description: A plugin made with the goal of fully integrating the Light Block into Semi-Vanilla Survival.
body:
A plugin made with the goal of fully integrating the Light Block into Semi-Vanilla Survival.

Features include
- Custom crafting recipe that "bottles" light items using a glass bottle
  - Different items give different amounts of Light Blocks
  - Light Items and output quantities can be configured
- The ability to interact with Light Blocks in Survival Mode
  - You can view, break, and place Light Blocks just as if you were in Creative Mode
  - Light Blocks drop as items, including the level they are, when broken by a player in survival
- Crafting Light Blocks of different levels in a stone cutter
  - https://i.imgur.com/axqqpfi.png
